/usr/bin/ar qc libmodbus_vendor.a  CMakeFiles/modbus_vendor.dir/third_party_libraries/libmodbus/modbus.c.o CMakeFiles/modbus_vendor.dir/third_party_libraries/libmodbus/modbus-data.c.o CMakeFiles/modbus_vendor.dir/third_party_libraries/libmodbus/modbus-rtu.c.o CMakeFiles/modbus_vendor.dir/third_party_libraries/libmodbus/modbus-tcp.c.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libmodbus_vendor.a
